zh.title: 狗狗币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强
zh.content:
当前DOGE/USDT呈现窄幅震荡上行结构，价格维持在0.077附近整理后逐步抬升。整体多头动能温和增强，但上方仍受前高压制，短线以震荡上行格局为主。

MACD柱值持续为正且略扩张，短期多头趋势占优；价格站上20日均线0.0768，均线开始拐头向上。RSI缺失但结合动能判断未现超买信号。

下方支撑关注0.07708与0.07680附近，若跌破可能回测0.0760；上方阻力在0.07807及0.0790区域，突破需放量确认。

操作建议短线以区间交易为主，靠近支撑分批低吸，接近阻力逐步止盈。若MACD继续放大可轻仓跟随趋势，严格设置止损防回撤。强

en.title: Dogecoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Dogecoin vs USD is currently in a tight consolidation phase around 0.0777, following a minor intraday upward drift of 0.62%. Price action remains compressed between 0.0770 and 0.0781, indicating market indecision after a recent stabilization above short-term averages. The broader short-term structure is mildly bullish, as buyers continue to defend dips near the lower bound of the current range, preventing any meaningful bearish continuation.

Momentum indicators suggest early bullish stabilization. The MACD reading remains positive at 0.00069, indicating that upward momentum is still marginally dominant, although signal confirmation is incomplete due to missing signal line data. Price holding above the 20-period SMA at 0.0768 reinforces near-term support, while low volatility suggests accumulation rather than distribution within this narrow trading band. This structure typically precedes directional expansion once volume returns.

Immediate support is located at 0.0768 aligned with the 20-SMA, followed by stronger support at 0.0760 and psychological floor at 0.0750. On the upside, resistance is observed at 0.0781, with a breakout above this level opening potential extension toward 0.0795 and 0.0800. The compressed range suggests liquidity buildup, increasing the probability of a sharp move once either boundary is breached.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies in the absence of a confirmed breakout. Scalpers may consider buying near 0.0760–0.0768 support and taking profits near 0.0780–0.0795 resistance. A sustained close above 0.0781 could validate a bullish breakout setup targeting 0.0800, while a breakdown below 0.0750 would shift bias toward bearish continuation. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility compression. Position sizing should remain conservative until volatility expands.
